Entries.Name: Narrator
Entries.Line: Her growing disinterest radiates harder than the sun.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: If you're already making leaps without bothering to get to know me, I don't think that we're very like-minded. And too many people in my life are interested in the idea of me, not what I am.

Entries.Name: Goth Kweebec
Entries.Line: Sometimes negatively. Sometimes... I don't like calling this 'positive', because you are just annoying me.

Line.Text: Thanks, I guess. But also no thanks.
